title: V.E.C.T.O.R
fullTitle: Velocity-Enhanced Clustering for Transactional Outlier Recognition
domain: Real-Time Fraud Detection | Behavioral AI | Streaming Systems
description: Real-time fraud detection engine that personalizes anomaly detection to each user's behavior profile. Continuously learns individual behavior, clusters users into behavioral personas, assigns persona-specific anomaly models, and produces fraud risk scores in under 50 ms.
overview: V.E.C.T.O.R is a real-time fraud detection engine that personalizes anomaly detection to each user's behavior profile. Instead of applying a single global fraud model to all users, it continuously learns individual behavior, clusters users into behavioral personas, assigns persona-specific anomaly models, and produces fraud risk scores in under 50 ms. The system handles cold-start users via an XGBoost fallback, manages ambiguous transactions through 2FA verification, and provides a live monitoring dashboard. It is designed as a production-grade multi-layer streaming pipeline.

features.label: Dynamic User Profiling
features.description: Continuously updated behavior profiles: velocity, average spend, frequency, session behavior, time gaps, loan activity, channel usage.

features.label: Behavioral Clustering (Persona Engine)
features.description: Users grouped into clusters (low-spend/high-frequency, high-spend/low-frequency, loan-heavy, abnormal velocity). Fraud baselines differ per cluster.

features.label: Persona-Specific Fraud Models
features.description: Each cluster has its own Isolation Forest trained on that cluster's transaction distribution.

features.label: Cold-Start Handling
features.description: XGBoost fallback for users with <10 transactions.

features.label: Decision and Verification
features.description: Fraud score thresholds: <0.4 Approve, 0.4–0.8 2FA, >0.8 Block/Manual review.

features.label: Suspicion Buffer Mechanism
features.description: Logs suspicious but verified transactions to build trust-vs-suspicion history.

features.label: Live Dashboard
features.description: React frontend with real-time charts, Cloudflare Tunnel hosting.

algorithms.name: UMAP
algorithms.description: Dimensionality reduction for high-dimensional behavior vectors before clustering.

algorithms.name: HDBSCAN
algorithms.description: Density-based clustering, auto-detects number of clusters, supports noise/outliers.

algorithms.name: Isolation Forest
algorithms.description: Per-cluster anomaly detection; unsupervised, no fraud labels required.

algorithms.name: XGBoost
algorithms.description: Supervised fallback for early-stage scoring when user history is insufficient.

modules.name: Producer Module
modules.responsibility: CSV producer (batch) + custom UI producer (live) → JSON transaction events

modules.name: Stream Consumer / Processing
modules.responsibility: Pull events, validate schema, compute features

modules.name: Dynamic Feature Engineering
modules.responsibility: Velocity, avg amount, transactions/day, high-value frequency, time gaps, loan activity, channel usage

modules.name: Clustering Pipeline (UMAP+HDBSCAN)
modules.responsibility: Build user behavior vector → UMAP reduction → HDBSCAN clustering → cluster_id

modules.name: Model Management
modules.responsibility: Select model by user history (XGBoost or Isolation Forest)

modules.name: Persistence + Audit (MongoDB)
modules.responsibility: legit_transactions and fraud_transactions collections, full audit trail

modules.name: Monitoring + Dashboard
modules.responsibility: React frontend, Node.js backend, ~1-second auto-refresh, Cloudflare Tunnel hosting

results: Real-time fraud scoring pipeline operational at <50 ms latency
Behavioral clustering with persona-specific anomaly detection
Live monitoring dashboard with Cloudflare-hosted HTTPS endpoint
Full MongoDB audit trail for compliance
